x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Work notes are the primary content source for Now Assist Major Incident summaries and stakeholder briefings. High P1 work note coverage gives the AI rich timeline context.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Require work notes on all P1 incidents throughout the lifecycle. Add a UI policy prompting for work notes at key state transitions. Now Assist Major Incident summaries and stakeholder briefings are generated from work note content stored in sys_journal_field.
